positive: A stylized, high-contrast minimalist illustration featuring a celestial fox spirit (kitsune) sitting among glowing crescent moons and constellations. The fox has elegant, flowing lines and an ethereal glow. The composition is perfectly centered, designed for seamless repeat printing on apparel. Palette is limited to deep indigo, cosmic gold, and soft pearl white. Style must be clean linework, vector art aesthetic, combining Art Nouveau elegance with modern geometric abstraction. Dramatic backlighting emphasizes clean silhouettes. Highly detailed background textures suggest stardust and nebulas. Full body shot, centered, optimal print quality.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, poor anatomy, extra limbs, messy background, noisy, low detail, low contrast, photo, realism, gradient mesh
